description: Rise of Avalon Patch 2 - Hotfix 2 (28 August 2020) — Fixes.

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Resolved an issue where players newer to Corrupted Dungeons were more likely to be designated as defenders than invaders when registering for PvP

sections.searchable_text: Fixes Resolved an issue where players newer to Corrupted Dungeons were more likely to be designated as defenders than invaders when registering for PvP
